summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed by changing the passcode to 'sastra2026' in backend/main.mo. REQ-2 is addressed by adding a migration module and using the 'with migration' actor pattern to handle upgrades gracefully. REQ-3 is addressed by the getFriendlyErrorMessage helper in AdminLogin.tsx that intercepts raw IC/canister errors and returns clean messages.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added as a no-op passthrough, and the actor uses '(with migration = Migration.run)' syntax to handle upgrades.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only required the actor to not enter a stopped state and handle upgrades gracefully. The specific mechanism of adding a dedicated migration module file was not explicitly requested, though it is a reasonable implementation approach for the requirement.
